nodes.name: Instrument the drift detector (A1)
nodes.label: Instrument the drift detector (A1)
nodes.dod: PostToolUse hook fires → trace file gains the actual call; drift.py computes a non-empty verdict.

nodes.name: Arm the enforcement flags (A2 · OD-1)
nodes.label: Arm the enforcement flags (A2 · OD-1)
nodes.dod: with flags on, each rule returns BLOCK on a violating fixture and PASS on a clean one (per-rule).

nodes.name: Seed `# emits:` / `outputs:` SSOT (A2a)
nodes.label: Seed `# emits:` / `outputs:` SSOT (A2a)
nodes.dod: every ladder/ownership program resolves a non-empty declared-outputs set; drift-lock (⊇) holds.

nodes.name: Mechanical counters (A3)
nodes.label: Mechanical counters (A3)
nodes.dod: two simulated turns → turn-count advances without a model STORE; context-pressure reads real tokens.

nodes.name: One shared changeset base resolver (B1)
nodes.label: One shared changeset base resolver (B1)
nodes.dod: end-to-end, single-commit repo, new untested tools/X.py, base=None → ok is False. NO monkeypatching.

nodes.name: CI fetch-depth + merge-base (B2)
nodes.label: CI fetch-depth + merge-base (B2)
nodes.dod: CI-shaped checkout computes a non-trivial changeset; the gate is not forced-closed-on-every-PR.

nodes.name: Real CR-13 end-to-end test (B3)
nodes.label: Real CR-13 end-to-end test (B3)
nodes.dod: (this PR is the test) + a meta-assert that no R13 test monkeypatches both resolvers.

nodes.name: Close R13 coverage loopholes (B4)
nodes.label: Close R13 coverage loopholes (B4)
nodes.dod: add-only / rename-launder / typo-a-filename bypass fixtures all BLOCK.

nodes.name: Frozen shrink-only test-grandfather (OD-5)
nodes.label: Frozen shrink-only test-grandfather (OD-5)
nodes.dod: adding an entry fails the gate; removing one passes; a new neuron not in the list still requires a test.

nodes.name: Gate the dev-mode toggle (C1)
nodes.label: Gate the dev-mode toggle (C1)
nodes.dod: a programmatic dev-mode=true write is DENIED; the out-of-band path is ALLOWED.

nodes.name: Protect the enforcement core (C2)
nodes.label: Protect the enforcement core (C2)
nodes.dod: Write/Bash into tools/rules/*.py and .claude/settings.json BLOCKED with dev-mode OFF; allowed ON.

nodes.name: Clone/CI fail-closed (OD-6 · Wave G G3-D2)
nodes.label: Clone/CI fail-closed (OD-6 · Wave G G3-D2)
nodes.dod: fresh-clone fixture (no working/) with the sentinel present → fail-closed; no-active-project → loud N/A, not silent pass.

nodes.name: Build G1c or delete the claim (C3)
nodes.label: Build G1c or delete the claim (C3)
nodes.dod: interpreter computed-path write to axon/ DENIED by the OS with dev-mode OFF; axon/state/ writes still work.

nodes.name: Prose-vs-wiring meta-rule (D1)
nodes.label: Prose-vs-wiring meta-rule (D1)
nodes.dod: an unregistered r_*.py or a kernel-named-but-unwired rule fails the meta-gate.

nodes.name: Drift-gate unknown → fail-closed (D2 · OD-2)
nodes.label: Drift-gate unknown → fail-closed (D2 · OD-2)
nodes.dod: an unknown/stale trace → BLOCK; a real stable trace → PASS.

nodes.name: Unify the dual drift encoding (D3)
nodes.label: Unify the dual drift encoding (D3)
nodes.dod: every kernel TOOL(drift,…) literal parses (exit 0) against the resolved tool's parser.

nodes.name: R_PHASE_TRACKED to a biting runner (D4)
nodes.label: R_PHASE_TRACKED to a biting runner (D4)
nodes.dod: a program that takes the lock but never records a transition → BLOCK at the crucible gate.

nodes.name: Investigate the 29 legacy programs (OD-4)
nodes.label: Investigate the 29 legacy programs (OD-4)
nodes.dod: (investigation) — output is an ADR + a reachability report; no silent merge/ignore.

nodes.name: Fix the dead resume program (E1)
nodes.label: Fix the dead resume program (E1)
nodes.dod: an interrupted session is actually detected by `resume` (today it ~always says "no interrupted sessions").

nodes.name: QUARANTINE prune + orphan gates (E2)
nodes.label: QUARANTINE prune + orphan gates (E2)
nodes.dod: post-prune registry/disk sync stays 0-drift; each former orphan gate is either invoked by a runner or gone.

nodes.name: Test-or-delete below-radar drift tools (E3)
nodes.label: Test-or-delete below-radar drift tools (E3)
nodes.dod: rollback primitive has a real round-trip test; queue_tool registered + covered, or removed with callers migrated.

nodes.name: Registry status enum + alias_of (E4 · OD-7 enabler)
nodes.label: Registry status enum + alias_of (E4 · OD-7 enabler)
nodes.dod: an -ALIAS-in-filename is rejected by a registry lint; alias resolution works via the field.

nodes.name: Fix workflow-run --name (E5 · OD-7)
nodes.label: Fix workflow-run --name (E5 · OD-7)
nodes.dod: workflow-run --name <wf> resolves + runs; a program/workflow name collision is caught.

nodes.name: Reconcile self-models (F1)
nodes.label: Reconcile self-models (F1)
nodes.dod: a self-model-drift check (version/host-cap/host-model vs reality) fails when they diverge.

nodes.name: Menu link + count integrity (F2)
nodes.label: Menu link + count integrity (F2)
nodes.dod: a dead menu link or a stale-green dashboard fixture fails the menu-integrity check.

nodes.name: Naming conventions + authoring-guide section (F3 · OD-7)
nodes.label: Naming conventions + authoring-guide section (F3 · OD-7)
nodes.dod: a name violating the convention is flagged; the reporter scorecards every lint/audit rule across the corpus.

nodes.name: Generate the typed program graph (F4 · OD-3)
nodes.label: Generate the typed program graph (F4 · OD-3)
nodes.dod: the cycle/orphan checks fire on the known defects; the ~38%-isolated count is surfaced (not hidden by "0 errors").

nodes.name: Thin-kernel heavy-ceremony OFF-vs-ON (OD-8)
nodes.label: Thin-kernel heavy-ceremony OFF-vs-ON (OD-8)
nodes.dod: (experiment) — a reproducible protocol + a written verdict with the drift deltas; preserved as an ADR.

nodes.name: Wire the hr-team execution seam so AXON can ALWAYS convene a
nodes.label: Wire the hr-team execution seam so AXON can ALWAYS convene a real council
nodes.dod: roster-emitter returns N catalog-sourced seats incl. the mandatory process/challenger with their

nodes.name: Pin the R9 anchor to the .axon-governed sentinel (M4)
nodes.label: Pin the R9 anchor to the .axon-governed sentinel (M4)
nodes.dod: $AXON_ROOT only honoured with the tracked sentinel; sentinel-less env rejected. Closed the live one-line bypass.
nodes.proof: 781463a + 3497235 merged to main (fix/wave-g-residual-hardening merged; verified ancestor of main)

nodes.name: dev-mode ships default-OFF (M4)
nodes.label: dev-mode ships default-OFF (M4)
nodes.dod: dev-mode.md currently reads value:true (master lock OPEN). Revert to default-OFF; test asserts it defaults OFF

nodes.name: Constrain the R9 actor-whitelist to a PATH not an actor (M4)
nodes.label: Constrain the R9 actor-whitelist to a PATH not an actor (M4)
nodes.dod: _axon_io._R9_WHITELIST={"loop-receipt"} skips R9 for any caller passing _actor="loop-receipt" (lines 122/179).

nodes.name: Resolve the gating CI pipeline (M5)
nodes.label: Resolve the gating CI pipeline (M5)
nodes.dod: Only .github/workflows/ci.yml exists; remote is GitLab; NO .gitlab-ci.yml. fetch-depth:0 is a GitHub key.

nodes.name: Protect the flag dir (M3)
nodes.label: Protect the flag dir (M3)
nodes.dod: M6 golden-trace calibration test is mandatory before T0-1 closes.

nodes.name: Cheap OFF baseline + K2 self-abort threshold (pre-arming gate)
nodes.label: Cheap OFF baseline + K2 self-abort threshold (pre-arming gate)
nodes.dod: minimal OFF-state drift/cost baseline captured BEFORE flags harden; defines K2 failure threshold + self-abort (if instrumented drift does not improve below threshold post-Wave-0, HALT arming).
